summary: Biz support tickets dominated Slack at 12 mentions. COI requests were top Gmail theme (3 threads, all Nomaco). Total inbound of 57 is just under the 60-message goal line.

Massive volume spike — 156 total inbound (up from 57 on 5/28). Biz support tickets led Slack themes (15). Gmail was heavy on timesheet/invoice threads (8) and Apps Script build failures (7 script error notifications). Slack received count of 119 suggests a very high-activity ops day with heavy DM traffic from MDS, Will, Patty, Mario, and Austin.

Biz support tickets led again (16), slightly up from 6/23. Mentions spiked to 44 (up from 19) driven by roster optimization alerts, biz support rule book tags, and worker incident escalations. Clock correction volume rose to 8 with onsite timesheet tool auth work and clock-in requests. Total inbound (144) stayed elevated but down slightly from 6/23's 156.

Total inbound dropped to 104 (from 144 on 6/24), with Slack received down 40% to 76. Biz support tickets remained top Slack theme (14). Timesheet/invoice was the top Gmail theme (10 threads) driven by bulk invoice notifications, rate disputes, and a waived invoice. Build failures steady at 3 (Apps Script errors).

Lowest volume day on record (28 total inbound, down 73% from 6/25's 104) — Friday slowdown with Slack received dropping to just 8. Salesforce errors led themes (4 threads: Geopointe Geocoder, Assignment Plans, batch failure, and Close Lost Stale Opps flow). Rhino Staging timesheets continued steady (3 threads).

Highest volume Monday on record — 167 total inbound (up 6x from Friday's 28). Biz support tickets led Slack (12) with Mama Lola's clock-in escalation, Chairmans shift posts, and Vita Pros scheduling bugs. Salesforce errors spiked to 6 threads (Geopointe, Close Lost flow, MQL flow, batch failures). Heavy DM traffic from Cooper, Dimitri, Humna, MDS, and Jeff Chen around onsite tooling and new FO onboarding.

Highest total inbound on record (179, up from 167 on 6/29) driven by heavy DM traffic around onsite timesheet debugging, new FO onboarding (Jenny Simoneau setup), and interview rescheduling for Seguin on-site candidates. Salesforce errors tied with timesheet/invoice as top Gmail themes (7 each) — MQL Task Creation flow fired 5 errors overnight. Biz support led Slack (9) with Boring Company and Premier Brands escalations.

Total inbound (133) dropped 26% from Monday's record 179, settling into a normal midweek pace. Biz support led Slack (12) with Mama Lola's clock-in, Chairman Foods DSF, Wisconsin Cheese cancellation, and Berger Textiles 7/3 closure. Heavy DM traffic around onsite hiring (MDS, Oscar on Indeed postings, Grant on FO interviews), invoice adjustments (Shilpa/Saboor), and onsite training portal fixes. Sent volume (98) was highest-ever sent-to-received ratio day, reflecting proactive outreach — scaled accounts transition announcement, timesheet follow-ups, and Ashby job postings.

Biz support tickets hit a record 22 (up 83% from 12 on 7/1), heavily driven by Veho Tech plus Chairmans Foods, The Feed, Eagle Labs, and Berk Enterprises. Gmail inbox surged to 63 threads — Timesheet/Invoice led Gmail themes (10 threads). Gmail sent spiked to 22, driven by Pat Riley’s Independence Day shift check-in outreach triggering cancellations at multiple companies. Total inbound (164) rebounded from 133 on 7/1, approaching the 6/29 record of 167.
